name: rest-api-automation-newman
description: Automated API test suite for Frankfurter Exchange Rates API using Newman, Allure and GitHub Actions CI/CD.

scripts.test: newman run collections/frankfurter.postman_collection.json --environment environments/qa.postman_environment.json --reporters cli,allure,htmlextra --reporter-allure-export allure-results --reporter-htmlextra-export results/report.html
scripts.report: allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && allure open allure-report

author: Emiliano
